artPrompt: A hero shot of a single pair of sturdy flat leather walking shoes set upright on a sunlit patch of clipped green lawn, laces crisp, soles worn smooth from a thousand doorsteps, a golden afternoon shaft raking across the leather to throw a long dramatic shadow shape behind them. Blades of grass foreshortened toward the viewer, a folding table leg and a tipped bullhorn blurred in the warm ivory background, every surface fully painted. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Sensible Shoes
text:
Equipped creature gets +0/+1 and has vigilance. (Comfortable enough to canvass all day and still stand guard at the polls.)
Equip {1}
flavorText: "You can't recall a mayor in heels. Well, you can, but your feet will file their own grievance."
